description: Product Description Invisible Ice Fresh Anti-Perspirant Spray Deodorant with Anti-Stain Technology for Men Gives you original and long-lasting protection against sweat and odor for 48 hours. With motionsense technology that activates with motion, it gives you protection when you need it most. Plus, its 0% alcohol formula offers long-lasting protection and keeps you feeling fresh throughout the day. Its packaging has a cap and activator that reduce the use of plastic by 40%. Choose your protection at every moment. Rexona gives you original protection thanks to its nonstop protection technology that lasts. Meet all the products in the range: Cobalt Dry and Invisible Ice Fresh. Also available in savings format. At Rexona we seek to inspire confidence in each one to move more. We want to accompany you as you face the challenges and difficulties of day to day. Enjoy the movement as you have the protection and effectiveness. To enjoy all its benefits, you should shake the product before use. Then, steam keeping the spray 15 cm from the underarm skin. To preserve the product properly, it should not be exposed to temperatures is 50º. The information on the website may differ from the information on the product labelling. If you have any intolerances or allergies please check the product labelling. Directions Clean and dry underarm area before applying. Apply a thin, even layer of deodorant to the underarm area, taking care to avoid stains on clothes. Allow the deodorant to dry completely before putting on clothes. Reapply as needed during the day or after physical activity for continued protection.
